craigslist.title: Dishwashers available in select homes
craigslist.full_address: 00PM President Madison Apartments 31597 Harlo Drive, Madison Heights, MI
craigslist.geocode_query: 00PM President Madison Apartments 31597 Harlo Drive, Madison Heights
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This is a 1 Bedroom, 1 Bath, Approximately 820 Sq. Ft. Use this link for more information: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/ov1a8l Call Now - show contact info x 236 OR Text 236 to show contact info to contact us. President Madison Apartments Community Info: Whether you choose a 1 & 2 bedroom floor plan, when you step inside your new home at President Madison near Troy, you'll be greeted by the warm embrace of comfort. A large, open-area living room with a picture window gives way to thoughtfully upgraded kitchen appliances, hardwood flooring, and a gas stove. Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Features: ‣  Gas Range in all apartment homes ‣  Dishwashers available in select homes ‣  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ‣  Carports available ‣  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Satin nickel hardware throughout residence ‣  Spacious closets ‣  Resident Storage located on-site ‣  Soft hued paint accented with white paneled doors ‣  Beautifully designed kitchen featuring oak cabinetry, GE white appliances and dark walnut* vinyl plank flooring ‣  Accent walls in living area of apartment home ‣  Secured entrance for each residence ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 856 square feet ‣  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ‣  Large picture windows fitted with designer selected blinds ‣  Common laundry room with full size GE wash and dryer Community Amenities: ‣  BILT Payment Center ‣  Beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool ‣  Expansive community center ‣  Updater Application ‣  Beautiful, mature landscape ‣  Package Receiving ‣  Online Resident Portal ‣  FLEX Rental Payment ‣  Internet café with gourmet coffee bar ‣  Pet-friendly community with a well-designed pet area, close to a city dog park ‣  Carports available ‣  On-site resident storage area ‣  Professionally equipped exercise room with flat screen television ‣  Professional Onsite Management Team Pet Policy: We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at President Madison. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore President Madison with you. Office Hours: Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM President Madison Apartments 31597 Harlo Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Equal Housing Opportunity PtGztw925
